economic_notes: Ontario First Nation Limited Partnership distributions of $1,209,624 received. Subsequent to year end, a fire destroyed a six-plex housing unit (insured). First Nation named as defendant in a lawsuit. Fuel sales operations present on reserve.
notes: Audit is qualified on three bases: (1) incomplete tangible capital asset inventory not fully PSAB-compliant, (2) inability to verify fuel inventory, (3) inability to verify Ontario Works expenditures. Prior period restated: accounts payable and economic development expenses understated by $979,931 in FY2020. Consolidated subsidiary: Washaho Socio Economic Development Department. Gain on disposal of TCA of $39,209 included in annual surplus. Balance sheet not fully provided in text — current liabilities total not extractable; net financial assets taken from Statement of Changes. Restricted cash of $31,001 is CMHC replacement reserve. Portfolio investments include Exchange Income Corporation shares at cost $846,746 and Wasaya Group Inc. fully impaired.
